title: Ceremonial Beast

moves.title: Stun
effects: Stunned — no action taken; must complete before transitioning

move_pattern: Starts with Stamp (applies Plow 150 to self), then Plow repeating indefinitely. When the Plow power is removed (e.g. via card effect), the beast becomes Stunned for one turn, then transitions to phase 2: Beast Cry → Stomp → Crush → Beast Cry (cycling).
notes: Two-phase boss. Phase 1: Stamp applies 150 Plow, then Plow attacks every turn (dealing 20 damage) and gains 2 Strength per hit. When Plow is removed externally, the beast is stunned for one mandatory turn (STUN_MOVE), then enters Phase 2. Phase 2 cycles: Beast Cry (1 Ringing to all) → Stomp (17 damage) → Crush (19 damage + 4 Strength) → Beast Cry. CrushStrength ascension value is 4.
